**STOP.** Do not file a security issue here.

Report vulnerabilities privately via:

- GitHub Security Advisories: <https://github.com/arshad-shah/extforge/security/advisories/new>
- Email: shaharshad57@gmail.com

See [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/arshad-shah/extforge/blob/main/SECURITY.md) for the full disclosure process.
